name: @trackx/api-core
description: Route-independent API services, repositories, and clients for TrackX.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @trackx/db build && pnpm --filter @trackx/shared build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @trackx/db build && pnpm --filter @trackx/shared build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
